title: Registration of Foreign Placement Agencies (FPA) with the POEA
content: Foreign Placement Agencies (FPAs) or similar entities may qualify for registration with the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) as principals if they are authorized to operate as such in their respective countries. Their registration is subject to guidelines that may be prescribed by the POEA.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
